items.name: Lead to Opportunity Sales Process
items.description: Standard OOB business process flow guiding a lead through Qualify > Develop > Propose > Close, transitioning onto the opportunity after qualification.

items.name: Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing
items.description: Calculates con_leadscore from source/rating/firmographics via the Contoso Lead Score custom API and assigns owner by territory; posts hot-lead alerts to the sales channel.

_powerAutomate.name: Contoso Lead Scoring & Routing
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a lead is created or updated (Dataverse trigger)

items.name: Deal Desk Approval Routing
items.description: Sends the discount request through Approvals; on approval stamps con_approvedon and unblocks quote generation.

_powerAutomate.name: Deal Desk Approval Routing
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a Deal Desk Review is created

items.name: Auto-Create Deal Desk Review on Strategic Deal
items.description: Real-time workflow that creates a con_dealdeskreview record and blocks quote presentation until approved.

items.name: Require Est. Close Date & Value on Propose
items.description: Business rule making estimatedvalue and estimatedclosedate required and showing a strategic-deal warning at the Propose stage.

items.name: Invoice Paid Sync from F&O
items.description: Async workflow that updates invoice status to Paid when a fully settled F&O payment is surfaced via dual-write.

items.name: Phase to First Response and Resolution
items.description: Business process flow guiding agents through Identify, Research, and Resolve stages with required fields and SLA checkpoints.

items.name: Auto-Route New Cases to Tier Queue
items.description: Real-time classic workflow that assigns a case to the correct queue based on con_channelsource, product subject, and entitlement tier.

items.name: Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation
items.description: Cloud flow that posts an adaptive card to the manager's Teams channel and emails the account owner when a Gold/Platinum case is escalated.

_powerAutomate.name: Notify Manager on High-Priority Escalation
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a row is added (con_escalation)

items.name: Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback
items.description: Cloud flow that ingests Customer Voice responses, calls Azure sentiment scoring, and upserts a con_servicefeedback row linked to the originating case.

_powerAutomate.name: Sync CSAT Survey Responses to Service Feedback
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a survey response is submitted (Customer Voice)

items.name: Require Resolution Notes Before Close
items.description: Business rule enforcing that resolution description and root-cause subject are populated before a case can be set to Resolved.

items.name: Nightly Knowledge Article Review Reminder
items.description: Async process that flags published articles past con_reviewduedate and assigns a review task to the article owner.

items.name: Work Order Lifecycle
items.description: Business process flow guiding a work order through Identify, Estimate, Schedule, Perform, and Close-Out stages.

items.name: Auto-Create Safety Inspection for Hazardous Work Orders
items.description: Real-time workflow that spawns a con_safetyinspection record and blocks booking until it exists when the hazardous site flag is set.

items.name: SLA Breach Risk Escalation
items.description: Cloud flow that notifies the dispatch team channel, creates a penalty credit per con_slapenaltyrule, and posts to the account owner.

_powerAutomate.name: SLA Breach Risk Escalation
_powerAutomate.trigger: When con_slabreachrisk changes to High or Breached

items.name: Agreement Booking Setup Generation
items.description: Async workflow kicking off the OOB agreement booking date/invoice date generation so recurring maintenance work orders are auto-created.

items.name: Truck Stock Replenishment Request
items.description: Cloud flow that raises a dual-write purchase order in F&O when truck-stock inventory drops below threshold.

_powerAutomate.name: Truck Stock Replenishment Request
_powerAutomate.trigger: When msdyn_availablequantity falls below reorder point

items.name: Require Serial Number on Serviceable Assets
items.description: Business rule making msdyn_serialnumber mandatory and validating con_warrantyexpiry is in the future for active assets.

items.name: Certification Expiry Warning for Resources
items.description: Cloud flow that emails resource managers and flags bookable resources whose certification expires within 30 days so RSO can exclude them from hazardous work.

_powerAutomate.name: Certification Expiry Warning for Resources
_powerAutomate.trigger: Scheduled daily recurrence evaluating con_certexpirydate

items.name: Project Approval Business Process Flow
items.description: Guides a project from New through Estimate, Contract, Delivery, and Close stages, gating quote approval and PMO health sign-off.

items.name: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder
items.description: Scans draft time entries per bookable resource and posts an Adaptive Card reminder to Teams to submit weekly time.

_powerAutomate.name: Contoso Time Entry Auto-Submit Reminder
_powerAutomate.trigger: Scheduled (weekly, Friday 16:00)

items.name: Margin Alert on Actuals Posting
items.description: Real-time workflow that recalculates project margin and sets con_marginalert on msdyn_project when actual cost breaches the estimated margin threshold.

items.name: Staffing Request Fulfillment Routing
items.description: Routes a new staffing request to the resourcing desk queue, creates an approval, and on approval books a bookable resource onto the project team.

_powerAutomate.name: Staffing Request Fulfillment Routing
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a row is created (con_resourcerequest)

items.name: Expense Receipt Required Rule
items.description: Business rule making the receipt attachment mandatory and locking submission when msdyn_amount exceeds the policy threshold until con_receiptverified is true.

items.name: Contract Line to F&O Sync
items.description: Async workflow that flags a confirmed contract line for dual-write synchronization of billing terms to Finance & Operations project accounting.

items.name: Sales-Ready Lead Handoff
items.description: Real-time workflow that reassigns a lead to the routing team and sets rating to Hot when the lead score crosses the model threshold.

items.name: Campaign Brief Approval Routing
items.description: Cloud flow that starts a multi-stage Approvals request to the marketing director and finance, then writes the outcome back to con_approvalstatus.

_powerAutomate.name: Campaign Brief Approval Routing
_powerAutomate.trigger: When con_approvalstatus set to In Review

items.name: Event Registration Confirmation
items.description: Cloud flow triggering a real-time journey via custom trigger to send a confirmation email and add the contact to the reminder cadence.

_powerAutomate.name: Event Registration Confirmation
_powerAutomate.trigger: On create of Event Registration

items.name: Consent Change Suppression Sync
items.description: Async classic workflow that flags the related contact as non-marketable and removes it from active static segments.

items.name: Require Legal Footer Before Email Go-Live
items.description: Business rule that makes con_legalfooterid required and blocks Brand Approval = Approved until a legal footer is set.

items.name: Campaign Brief to Launch BPF
items.description: Business process flow guiding stages Intake > Budget Approval > Content Build > Journey Configuration > Launch across the brief, email, and journey.

items.name: Sync Churn Prediction to Loyalty Tier

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Classic async workflow that reads the churn score on new Prediction Score rows and stamps con_churnriskband on the related unified profile.

items.name: Consent Verified Guard for Segment Activation

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Business rule that requires con_consentverified = true before an activation channel can be set, preventing non-consented audience export.

items.name: Consent Capture Business Rule
items.description: Makes con_consentcapturedon required and visible when con_consentstatus is set to Granted; clears it when set to Withdrawn.

items.name: Data Source Health Alert to Teams

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Cloud flow that posts a Teams alert and opens a ServiceNow incident when an ingestion refresh fails.

_powerAutomate.name: Data Source Health Alert to Teams
_powerAutomate.trigger: On Create where con_refreshstatus = Failed

items.name: DSR Delete Propagation

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Cloud flow orchestrating right-to-erasure: tombstones the unified profile, calls the CI-Data delete API, and notifies downstream systems via Azure Service Bus.

_powerAutomate.name: DSR Delete Propagation
_powerAutomate.trigger: On Create where con_consenttype = DSR - Delete

items.name: Unified Profile Enrichment - F&O Credit

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Real-time workflow that copies credit limit and payment terms from the F&O virtual customer master (mserp_custcustomerv3entity) onto the matched account for downstream measures.

items.name: Data Onboarding & Unification Approval

tags.processCatalogL1: CI.00 Customer Data Platform (Unified Customer Data)

items.description: Business process flow: Register Source -> Map Entities -> Assign Semantic Types -> Match Rules Review -> Unification Sign-off. Enforces CoE governance gates on new data ingestion.

items.name: AP Invoice Approval BPF
items.description: Business Process Flow guiding AP approvers through Review, Tier Assignment, Approval, and Post stages based on invoice amount thresholds.

items.name: Capex Budget Check Flow
items.description: Cloud flow that calls the D365 Finance budget-availability check via the F&O connector, writes con_budgetavailable, and routes to Approved or Budget Check exception.

_powerAutomate.name: Capex Budget Check Flow
_powerAutomate.trigger: On con_capexrequest status change to Submitted

items.name: Dunning Escalation Async Workflow
items.description: Classic async workflow that escalates dunning level and sets con_ondunninghold on the related account when overdue amount exceeds credit limit.

items.name: Credit Risk Rating Business Rule
items.description: Business rule that flags con_creditriskrating as Watchlist and makes payment terms read-only when the credit limit is exceeded by open AR.

items.name: Exchange Rate Sync Flow
items.description: Scheduled cloud flow pulling daily FX rates and stamping exchangerate + con_lastratesyncon on transactioncurrency records.

_powerAutomate.name: Exchange Rate Sync Flow
_powerAutomate.trigger: Scheduled daily 05:00 UTC

items.name: Vendor Invoice Post Realtime Workflow
items.description: Real-time workflow that writes back the approval decision to the F&O vendor invoice via dual-write and stamps the posting reference on the approval request.

items.name: Requisition Approval BPF
items.description: Business process flow guiding a requisition through Draft, Vendor Selection, Approval, and PO Generation stages.

items.name: Auto-Set ABC Classification
items.description: Business rule defaulting con_abcclassification based on product value thresholds.

items.name: Generate PO in F&O on Approval
items.description: Cloud flow that calls the F&O purchase order OData action to create a PO and writes con_generatedponumber back to the requisition.

_powerAutomate.name: Generate PO in F&O on Approval
_powerAutomate.trigger: When con_approvalstatus = Approved

items.name: Shipment Delivery Notification
items.description: Cloud flow notifying the customer contact and updating the related F&O sales order line ship confirmation.

_powerAutomate.name: Shipment Delivery Notification
_powerAutomate.trigger: When con_shipmentstatus changes to Delivered

items.name: Reassign Requisition on Vendor Approval
items.description: Real-time workflow that reactivates held requisitions when their suggested vendor becomes Approved.

items.name: Post Cycle Count Variance
items.description: Async workflow that flags counts with material variance for supervisor review before F&O posting.

items.name: Loyalty Points Accrual
items.description: Classic async workflow that calculates and posts reward points to the linked loyalty card when a qualifying transaction is created.

items.name: Curbside Handoff Notification
items.description: Cloud flow that alerts the store fulfillment team via Teams and sends the customer an SMS/email when they mark themselves as arrived.

_powerAutomate.name: Curbside Handoff Notification
_powerAutomate.trigger: When con_handoffstatus changes to Customer Arrived

items.name: Price Match Approval
items.description: Cloud flow routing competitor price-match requests through an approval to the store manager, then writing back an approved pricing rule.

_powerAutomate.name: Price Match Approval
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a price match request is created

items.name: Statement Posting Guard
items.description: Real-time workflow preventing a statement from moving to Posted unless all transactions are reconciled and fraud scores are cleared.

items.name: Gift Card Balance Rule
items.description: Business rule that marks a gift card inactive and hides tender eligibility when the balance reaches zero.

items.name: Clienteling Appointment Lifecycle
items.description: Business process flow guiding associates through Request > Curate Wishlist > Appointment > Follow-Up stages for personal-shopper appointments.

items.name: Channel Data Publish Trigger
items.description: Cloud flow that calls a Logic App to queue a channel data publish (job 1070) so new pricing reaches the Commerce Scale Unit.

_powerAutomate.name: Channel Data Publish Trigger
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a pricing rule is created or updated

items.name: Leave Request Approval
items.description: Business process flow guiding a leave request through Submitted -> Manager Review -> HR Validation -> Approved/Rejected stages, driving the mshr_requeststatus field at each stage.

items.name: Leave Balance Notification Flow
items.description: Cloud flow that decrements the matching mshr_leaveenrollment accrued balance and posts an approval adaptive card to the worker and manager in Teams.

_powerAutomate.name: Leave Balance Notification Flow
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a leave request is approved (Dataverse)

items.name: New Hire Onboarding Orchestration
items.description: Generates the standard con_onboardingtask checklist from a template, provisions the M365 account, and notifies the hiring manager via Approvals.

_powerAutomate.name: New Hire Onboarding Orchestration
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a worker is created (Dataverse)

items.name: Probation End Reminder
items.description: Classic background workflow that emails the manager and HRBP two weeks before a worker's probation end date to prompt a confirmation decision.

items.name: Position Cost Center Validation
items.description: Business rule requiring con_costcenter when con_fulltimeequivalent is greater than 0, and hiding it for FTE = 0 positions.

items.name: Performance Review Compensation Sync
items.description: Real-time workflow that flags eligible workers for a merit increase and creates a draft cdm_fixedcompensation adjustment when a review is finalized.

items.name: Termination Access Deprovisioning
items.description: On termination, disables the worker's M365 account, revokes app roles, and files an offboarding record via a Logic App bridge to ServiceNow.

_powerAutomate.name: Termination Access Deprovisioning
_powerAutomate.trigger: When cdm_employmentenddate is set (Dataverse)

items.name: Contoso Conversation Lifecycle BPF
items.description: Business process flow guiding agents through Greet, Identify Customer, Diagnose, Resolve, and Wrap-up stages of a conversation.

items.name: Set VIP Flag on High-Value Customer
items.description: Business rule that sets con_vipflag when the linked contact belongs to a strategic account segment.

items.name: Escalate Low-Sentiment Conversation to Supervisor
items.description: Real-time workflow that raises an escalation and notifies the supervisor queue when the conversation's sentiment pulse drops below threshold.

items.name: Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch
items.description: Cloud flow that sends a Customer Voice CSAT survey and writes the score back to the linked case con_csatscore.

_powerAutomate.name: Post-Conversation CSAT Survey Dispatch
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a conversation is closed (Dataverse trigger)

items.name: Sync Channel Budget from Finance
items.description: Scheduled cloud flow reconciling per-channel budget vs actuals from Dynamics 365 Finance via dual-write for the CoE cost dashboard.

_powerAutomate.name: Sync Channel Budget from Finance
_powerAutomate.trigger: Recurrence (nightly)

items.name: Deflection Outcome Rollup
items.description: Async classic workflow aggregating daily containment rate and cost avoided onto the reporting entity.

items.name: Environment Provisioning Approval
items.description: Routes new environment requests through a Teams Approval to the CoE admins; on approval updates con_lifecyclestate to Provisioning and calls the Power Platform for Admins connector to create the environment.

_powerAutomate.name: Environment Provisioning Approval
_powerAutomate.trigger: When a row is created (con_environmentinventory, con_lifecyclestate = Requested)

items.name: Orphaned Flow & App Detector
items.description: Scans workflow and app ownership; when an owner is disabled in systemuser, creates a con_coecomplianceattestation with con_result 'Orphaned - Reassign' and notifies the CoE.

_powerAutomate.name: Orphaned Flow & App Detector
_powerAutomate.trigger: Scheduled - daily 02:00 UTC

items.name: Compliance Attestation Reminder
items.description: Finds attestations past con_nextduedate and sends adaptive-card reminders to attesters via Teams; escalates to business-unit owner after 14 days.

_powerAutomate.name: Compliance Attestation Reminder
_powerAutomate.trigger: Scheduled - weekly Monday 08:00

items.name: Account Data Steward Assignment
items.description: Synchronously stamps con_datastewardid from the owning business unit's default steward team when a golden-record account (con_mdmgoldenrecord = true) is created.

items.name: Environment Onboarding Process
items.description: Guides an environment from Request > DLP Assignment > Owner Attestation > Capacity Review > Active across CoE stages.

items.name: Unmanaged Layer Alert
items.description: Async classic workflow that flags when an unmanaged solution appears in a Production environment and creates a governance task for the CoE.
